headline: KLA (KLAC) Stock After Split And Strong AI Outlook Is The Valuation Still Attractive
summary: What KLA's 10-for-1 stock split actually changes for you KLA (KLAC) has just completed a ten-for-one forward stock split, effective late on June 11, 2026, alongside a Charter Amendment that lifted authorized common shares from 500,000,000 to 5,000,000,000. For existing shareholders, each pre split share now converts into ten shares, with the total economic stake unchanged. The higher authorized share count simply gives KLA more capacity to issue stock in future, for uses such as employee...
